name: Cia de Ferro Ligas da Bahia - FERBASA
summary: Cia de Ferro Ligas da Bahia - FERBASA manufactures and sells ferroalloys, ferrochrome, and ferrosilicon in Brazil. The company offers high-carbon ferrochrome, low-carbon ferrochrome, ferrochrome silicon, ferrosilicon, chromite sand, lump, and lime. It also engages in the mining, forestry, metallurgy businesses. The company was founded in 1961 and is based in Salvador, Brazil. Cia de Ferro Ligas da Bahia - FERBASA is a subsidiary of Funda√É¬ß√É¬£o Jos√É¬© Carvalho.
